steps.title: Apply the land art pattern
steps.content: The passage identifies Ancient Language as part of land art and says land artists usually install large-scale works outdoors, often in surprising locations. A geoglyph made of rocks in the Atacama Desert fits that pattern.

steps.title: Reject unsupported inferences
steps.content:
• Choice B adds a claim about the movement's popularity, which the passage never discusses.
  • Choice C conflicts with land art's rejection of commercialization and adds unsupported commercial success.
  • Choice D requires information about Mercer's career timeline that the passage does not provide.
The answer is A.
